# Delaware Weather Network — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A comprehensive weather information portal focused on the state of Delaware, offering real-time weather data including watches and warnings, location-based forecasts, interactive radar, UV index readings, tide times, and sunrise/sunset schedules. The site is designed to be a go-to resource for Delaware residents and visitors seeking accurate and up-to-date local weather intelligence.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://delaware-weather-network-bc0c78e6.zappy5.app
Your ultimate Delaware weather hub: scan live local weather radar near me, track storms in real time, and get instant watches and warnings. Stay ahead of every front!

### Forecasts & Conditions
https://delaware-weather-network-bc0c78e6.zappy5.app/forecasts-conditions
Dive into hyper-local forecasts powered by live local weather radar. From hourly shifts to severe alerts, plan your Delaware day with precision. Check conditions now!

### Coastal & Sun
https://delaware-weather-network-bc0c78e6.zappy5.app/coastal-sun
Master Delaware&#39;s coast with tide times, UV index, and sunrise schedules backed by local weather radar near me. Your beach day starts with perfect timing. Explore coastal data!

### Contact
https://delaware-weather-network-bc0c78e6.zappy5.app/contact
Have a weather question or need custom radar insights? Reach out to Delaware Weather Network and let our meteorology pros equip you with live local weather radar answers.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://delaware-weather-network-bc0c78e6.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://delaware-weather-network-bc0c78e6.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Delaware Weather Network
A comprehensive weather information portal focused on the state of Delaware, offering real-time weather data including watches and warnings, location-based forecasts, interactive radar, UV index readings, tide times, and sunrise/sunset schedules. The site is designed to be a go-to resource for Delaware residents and visitors seeking accurate and up-to-date local weather intelligence.

## Services/Products
- Current weather watches and warnings
- Forecasts by location
- Weather radar
- UV index
- Tide times
- Sunrise and sunset times
- Contact form
- Facebook and Twitter social links

## Target Audience
- Delaware Residents and Visitors
- Local Business Owners
- Outdoor Enthusiasts

## Industry
Weather & Meteorology

---

- Robots: https://delaware-weather-network-bc0c78e6.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://delaware-weather-network-bc0c78e6.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
